blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this path! Job well done!

You have successfully:

- Navigated to the Notification policies page
- Created a new child notification policy
- Defined label matchers to target specific alerts
- Selected a dedicated contact point for matched alerts
- Saved the child policy to the notification tree

---

### More to explore

Now that you've created a child policy, explore these related tasks:

- Create additional child policies for other teams or severity levels
- [Notification policies documentation](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/alerting/fundamentals/notifications/notification-policies/) for the full reference
- Experiment with the **Continue matching siblings** toggle to send the same alert to multiple teams

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this one:

- [Edit the default notification policy](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/alerting-edit-default-policy/)
- [Create a silence](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/create-silence/)
- [Configure a mute timing](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/configure-mute-timing/)
